title: Billing Settings
subtitle: Configure default billing settings for students

paymentDueDays.label: Default Due Date (in days)
paymentDueDays.description: How many days after invoice creation it should be due. Applied to all new invoices.

defaultBillingDay.label: Default Billing Day
defaultBillingDay.description: Day of the month to be suggested when registering new students (1-28). Leave empty for no default.

messages.updateSuccessDescription: Your billing settings have been saved successfully.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.description: Configure which payment methods your students can use to pay invoices.
paymentMethods.minimumRequired: At least one method must be enabled
paymentMethods.noBusinessProfile: Configure a business profile to manage payment methods

changeConfirmation.title: Change Payment Method?
changeConfirmation.descriptionPix: You already have a valid PIX generated. Changing will cancel the previous payment.
changeConfirmation.descriptionBoleto: You already have a valid Boleto generated. Changing will cancel the previous payment.

errors.methodNotAvailable: Your teacher does not have this payment option available

fees.title: Payment Fees
fees.description: Payments have Stripe fees that vary by method:
